canonical_definition: A generative error correction benchmark for LLM-enhanced ASR containing over 316K hypotheses-transcription pairs from mainstream ASR corpora, used to evaluate H2T mapping.
papers: It's Never Too Late: Fusing Acoustic Information into Large Language Models for Automatic Speech Recognition
Large Language Models are Efficient Learners of Noise-Robust Speech Recognition
